title: Client Onboarding Kit — Notion Template + 40 AI Prompts for Freelancers
subtitle: Professional onboarding system: welcome packets, SOWs, kickoff agendas & more.
description:
First impressions close deals. Sloppy onboarding loses clients.

Notion-based onboarding system + 40 AI prompts for freelancers, consultants, and small agencies.

Notion Dashboard includes:
• Client Database (CRM)
• Onboarding Pipeline (Kanban)
• Document Hub (6 templates)
• Task Checklist (auto-populated)
• Meeting Notes Log

Document Templates:
• Welcome Packet
• Scope of Work (SOW)
• Project Timeline
• Communication Guidelines
• Feedback & Revision Process
• Invoice Schedule & Payment Terms

40 AI Prompts:
• 8 Pre-Sale prompts (proposals, pricing, contracts)
• 12 Onboarding prompts (welcome emails, questionnaires, briefs)
• 12 During-Project prompts (updates, scope creep, feedback)
• 8 Offboarding prompts (handoff, testimonials, upsells)

Format: Notion template + PDF prompt guide
Updates: Free lifetime updates
